view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for digital products (download links).

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for digital products (download links).

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Digital products (download links)', but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm whether the digital product, specifically the 'Hair Care Guide' PDF download, is functioning as intended. While the use case mentions a digital option, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to confirm that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion about the requirement's satisfaction.
